programmes.show_description: Sraith ina ndéantar taifeadadh ar fhíseáin cheoil ar fud na hÉireann. (This series showcases the 32 counties of Ireland through country music videos all shot on location.)
Níl deacracht ar bith ag Colm Mac Con Iomaire ná ag Mark McCambridge a gcumas a roinnt agus a mheascadh.(Colm Mac Con Iomaire & Mark McCambridge find their musical middle ground.)
Dúnmharaítear úinéir luaimh, a bhfuil neart airgid aige, dhá lá roimh sula dtosaíonn rása mór. (Jessica investigates when a wealthy yachtsman is murdered before a big race.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Táthar sa tóir ar an teaghlach is cumasaí in Éirinn. Á chur i láthair ag Síomha Ní Ruairc. (The search for Ireland's most talented family continues. Presented by Síomha Ní Ruairc.)
Tabharfaidh Miséil De Grás aghaidh ar Marion Sweeney. (Miséil De Grás from An Rinn goes up against Marion Sweeney from Gort an Choirce.)
Ar an gclár seo inseoidh an bhanríon draig Kitty dúinn faoin gcion atá aici ar Mhicheál D. Ó hUiginn. (Drag Queen Kitty in talks about how much she loves Michael D. Higgins.)
Is é Eoiní Mhaidhcí Ó Súilleabháin as Cúil Aodha a bheidh ar chlár na seachtaine seo. (Cúil Aodha native Eoiní Mhaidhcí Ó Súilleabháin sings his favourite songs.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Nil aon easpa claracha do dhaoine oga ar Cula4 - bi ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in eineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cula4 - watch, play and learn.)
Har! Har! Ta Ribin agus Glibin fuadaithe ag foghlaithe mara. An mbeidh siad in ann ealu? (Har! Har! Ribin and Glibin have been captured by the pirates.)
Ta inneall Bobby an Bhus salach agus ta Fiona Inneall Doiteain ag iarraidh bonnan nios airde. (Bobby the Bus' engine is dirty and Fiona the Fire Engine wants a louder siren.)
Faigheann Cory agus Chrissy peata nua i ngan fhios do Dhaide agus Mama! (Cory and Chrissy get a new pet, unbeknownst to Mama and Papa!)
Caithfear na caoirigh a locadh ach ta Barkley, an madra caorach, tinn. (It's time to move the sheep into their new pen, but Barkley the sheepdog is sick.)
Caithfidh ar gcairde doras nua a dheanamh don sciobol. (The Mechas use different materials to make a new barn door.)
Ta Mamo agus Timmy le dealbh cloiche a dheanamh ach meas tu an bhfuil fios a ngno acu? (Grandma and Timmy plan to carve a scuplture out of stone.)
Cuireann an Ninja Oiche an dallamullog ar Armadylan. (Night Ninja made Armadylan believe the PJ Masks stole all the new Flossy Flash comics.)
Cabhraionn Finny le Muireann taitneamh a bhaint as an la ar scoil. (Finny helps shy little Myrtle the Turtle overcome her nerves, enjoy school, and make new friends.)
Taispeanann Roy a fheadog dhraiochta do Chaitriona. (Roy has a special whistle and shows Caitriona it's magical powers.)
Cen chaoi a n-eireoidh le Ricky agus e ag iarraidh a bheith ina theireadachtalach inniu? (Ricky must be a pterodactyl today, but how will he get on?)
Bionn an-spraoi ag Ricky ag ligean air fein gur ridire e. (Today, Ricky has lots of fun as a knight.)
Ta Ricky ar thoir eachtraiochta inniu. (Today, Ricky is in search of an adventure, but will he find one?)
Tugann na Singalings aghaidh ar an gcathair ait a bhfuil neart le feiceail! (The Singalings are in the city where there are lots of things to see, even in the sky!)
Beidh na Singalings ag breathnu ar an hainmhithe agus na plandai a bhionn le fail sa bhfasach. (The Singalings name all the animals that live in the desert.)
Nil aon easpa claracha do dhaoine oga ar Cula4 - bi ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in eineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cula4 - watch, play and learn.)
Beidh Nic agus Saili ag imirt an chluiche 'Cuir Eireaball ar an Asal'. (Nick & Sally are playing "Pin the Tail on the Donkey" when they wish they had tails of their own.)
Ta Saili agus Nic ag ligean orthu fein gur drumai iad na boscai ata bun os cionn. (Sally and Nick are playing the drums on overturned buckets when Nick breaks his drumstick.)
Teastaionn cadhnrai on toirse le go mbeidh Nic, Saili agus Cat in ann cluiche a imirt. (Nick and Sally are making shadow puppets with the Cat in the Hat.)
Tugtar cuireadh do Nic, Saili agus Cat chuig turas seilidi. (Nick, Sally and the Cat have been invited along on a snail expedition!)
Ta Saili agus Nic ag ligean orthu fein go bhfuil siad ag eitilt. (Sally and Nick are pretending to fly in their backyard.)
Teastaionn duine eigin o Olivia a thabharfaidh aire da pearoid, Priompallan. (Olivia needs someone to mind her pet parrot, Bonaparte.)
Ta gach uile charta ag Zak ina bhailiuchan cartai seachas an carta oir Morvox. (Zak has every single card in his Stark Trick album...except one; the Golden Morvox.)
Buaicphointi o chluichi CLG agus Peil na mBan sraitheanna Allianz agus Lidl. (Highlights of the weekend's best GAA and Ladies Football action from the Allianz and Lidl leagues.)
Ta faobhar ar na sceana agus scor la caite ag na hiomaitheoiri sa gcluiche. (After 20 days in the game, battle lines are drawn, and the stakes cannot be higher.)
Craoladh beo o Pretoria ar an gcluiche idir na Bulls agus Cuige Mumhan sa gCraobh Rugbai Aontaithe. (Live coverage of the Bulls v Munster in the United Rugby Championship.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir Cuige Chonnacht agus Glasgow Warriors sa gCraobh Rugbai Aontaithe. (Live coverage of Connacht v Glasgow Warriors in the United Rugby Championship.)
Aimsir reigiunach agus naisiunta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 4. A chur i lathair ag Micheal O Domhnaill. (Live coverage of the Allianz Football League Division 4 Final.)
Aimsir reigiunach agus naisiunta. (National and regional weather.)
Morimeachtai an lae o Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 3. A chur i lathair ag Micheal O Domhnaill. (Live coverage of the Allianz Football League Division 3 Final.)
Tugtar leargas ar na pobail i se cheantar i nGaeltacht Mhuscrai i gContae Chorcai sa tsraith seo. (In this series we get an insight into the communities of the Muscrai Gaeltacht.)

programmes.show_name: Scannan: The End of the Affair
programmes.show_description: Feachann fear le dul ar ais in eineacht le bean a bhfuil se i ngra lei. (Maurice Bendrix is obsessed with his ex-mistress who abruptly ended their affair.)
Aimsir reigiunach agus naisiunta. (National and regional weather.)
Tabharfaidh Hector turas ar a thir fein agus casfaidh le pearsana eagsula ar an mbealach. (Hector takes us on a whirlwind tour of Ireland meeting people from all over the World.)
Ta Manue agus Johanna curtha den chas agus socraionn David Levy an choir a athchruthu. (With Manue and Johanna off the case, David Levy orders a reconstruction.)
Suil siar sa ar na hagallaimh, taibhleirithe agus gearrscannain on sraith Imeall. (A look back at interviews, performances, and short film pieces from the series Imeall.)
Morimeachtai an lae o Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Ceol agus comhluadar i measc lucht na gcaipini i gCeann Tra agus i nDun Chaoin. (Music & chat from our friends in Ceann Tra and Dun Chaoin. Presented by Breanndan O Beaglaoich.)
Tugann Doireann Ni Ghlacain aghaidh ar dheisceart Bhaile Atha Cliath sa gclar seo. (In this programme Doireann Ni Ghlacain travels to South Dublin.)
Caineal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince ata i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Nil aon easpa claracha do dhaoine oga ar Cula4 - bi ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in eineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cula4 - watch, play and learn.)
Ba mhaith le Ribin dul ag ceol in eineacht le Rocco ach nil aon cheol aici. (Ribin wants to play music with Rocco but she has a problem, her music is awful.)
Caithfidh an Meicneoir Gorm teacht i gcabhair ar Eric an Tochaltoir. Ta Gecko sainnithe i dtollan. (The Blue Mechanic must save Eric the Excavator. Gecko gets stuck in a tunnel.)
Bionn Cory faoi bhru nuair a theann na Carsons chuig an gcuirt bhabhlala. (Cory feels under pressure when the Carsons pay a trip to the bowling alley.)
Ta seo tallainne ar siul i gClos na mBalun ach nil a fhios ag Pip cen tallann ata aigesean. (It's Talent Show Day in Balloon Barnyard, but Pip isn't sure what to do.)
Tagann an Maor Nat ar einin na gcos mor nuair a bhionn se amuigh ag siul. (Ranger Nat comes across the Big-Footed Cave Bird while hiking.)
Is cosuil go bhfuil an cairrin ata Lloyd a thastail ag cailleadh cumhachta. (Lloyd's testing a wind-up powered go-cart, but a problem arises when it keeps running out of energy.)
Faigheann Gekko cumhachtai breise. (Gekko's powers are increased by the Power Pondweeds Romeo was after in an underwater mission.)
Ta Finny leis an oiche a chaitheamh tigh Mhuirinn den chead uair. (It's Finny's first sleepover and she is so nervous.)
Ta an diabhal ar Igam Ogam ag laimhseail rudai. (Igam Ogam can't resist touching things.)
Deanann Pinocchio margadh le Luidin O Laoi nach bhfasfaidh a shron ma insionn se breag. (Pinocchio makes a deal with Luidin O Laoi that his nose won't grow if he lies.)
Tugann Gepetto jab do Pinocchio, ach an feidir leis brath air an jab a dheanamh ceart? (Gepetto gives Pinocchio a job, but can he count on him to complete it?)
Nil aon easpa claracha do dhaoine oga ar Cula4 - bi ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in eineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cula4 - watch, play and learn.)
Nil aon duine ann le spraoi le Lola o tharla go bhfuil slaghdan ar Lotta. (Lotta has caught a cold, so Lola has no one to play with.)
Deir tuismitheoiri Charlie agus Lola leo a seomra a ghlanadh. (Charlie and Lola's parents tell them to clean their room.)
Is maith le Lola na rudai a fheiceann si nuair a bhionn si ag faire amach a tharraingt. (Lola likes spying and observing things and then drawing them.)
Ta Lola an-togtha le cleasa draiochta nua Charlie. (Charlie has a new magic kit and Lola is very impressed by it.)
La breithe Charlie ata ann agus ta se ag iarraidh go mbeadh teama arrachta ag a choisir. (It is Charlie's birthday, and he is planning a monster themed birthday party.)
Ceannaionn Zak fearas draiodora agus feachann se le cleasa a imirt ar a chairde. (After Zak buys a magician set, he tries out a few of his tricks for his friends.)
Ta cat darb ainm Saifir ar iarraidh agus ta duais airgid le fail ag an te a aimseoidh i. (Zak and his friends come across a poster of a missing cat called Sapphire.)
Is mian le Mo a bheith ina bhall den Chlub Robataice. (Mo dreams of joining the highly selective Robotics Club.)
Socraionn Mo rudai maithe a dheanamh ag suil go laghdofar an t-achar a coinneofar istigh e. (Mo tries to reduce his detention time with good deeds.)
Ta naire ar Sam dul chuig Teaghliombo lena mathair. (Sam tries to avoid the humiliation of Familimbo with her mother.)
Beidh Alanna ag tabhairt aire da deirfiur bheag ar Inis Mor. (Alanna takes care of her baby sister on Inis Mor.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhorscealta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Ta Blanche faoi gheasa ag saighdiuir ata tagtha abhaile o Mhurascaill na Peirse. (A soldier returning from the Persian Gulf sweeps Blanche off her feet.)
Is ag Seo Bhaile Mhoireil in Aontroim a bheifear sa gclar seo. (In this episode we get a taste of the Balmoral Show in Antrim.)
Clar trath na gceist i nGaeilge do dheagoiri! Cholaiste Marist v Scoil Mhuire Bhun Cranncha. (Irish language teen quiz show! Marist College Athlone v Scoil Mhuire Buncrana.)
Sa gclar deireanach feictear deireadh seasur amhain agus tus seasur eile. (In the final episode one season is coming to an end while another is getting geared up to begin.)
Aimsir reigiunach agus naisiunta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 2. A chur i lathair ag Micheal O Domhnaill. (Live coverage of the Allianz Football League Division 2 Final.)
Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Shraith Peile Allianz Roinn 1. A chur i lathair ag Micheal O Domhnaill. (Live coverage of the Allianz Football League Division 1 Final.)

programmes.show_name: Plant the Planet - GAA in Uganda
programmes.show_description: Clar faisneise ina bhfeictear mar a thugann an sport daoine le cheile ar fud an domhain. (A captivating documentary where we witness how sport unites cultures worldwide.)
Aimsir reigiunach agus naisiunta. (National and regional weather.)
Morimeachtai an lae o Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Ceiliuradh ar amhrain a bhiodh againn ag eiri anios. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Tugann tri fhoireann aghaidh ar a cheile chun an pota oir a bhuachan. Seo cluichi a chur i lathair ag Eibhlin Ni Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Lisa Murray agus Caoimhin a thabharfaidh faoin dushlan sa gclar seo. (This week, Lisa Murray and Caoimhin rise to the challenge.)
Ta an ghrain dhearg ag Natasha ar Cora agus ta Ferdia ag rith ar thanai! (Natasha is consumed by hatred toward Cora and Ferdia is on thin ice!)
Tugann Doireann Ni Ghlacain aghaidh ar Chiarrai Thuaidh sa gclar seo chun blaiseadh a fhail de cheol na haite. (Doireann Ni Ghlacain explores North Kerry's rich musical tradition.)
Turas ceoil ar an tSionainn le Sharon Shannon & a neacht Caoilinn. (Sharon Shannon and her niece Caoilinn Ni Dhonnabhain start their journey of the River Shannon.)
Aimsir reigiunach agus naisiunta. (National and regional weather.)
Teada a bheidh i mbun cainte le Daithi sa chlar seo. (In this episode, Daithi meets with Teada.)
